conditions: Clause must specify geographic scope
Clause must specify duration (max 1 year standard)
Only valid for employees earning above €5,500/month gross
Must be in writing and signed
Indefinite-term contracts only, unless employer demonstrates substantial business interest in writing
illegalIf: Applied to fixed-term contract without written justification of substantial business interest
exploitativeIf: Duration is 12 months with no compensation clause
Scope covers entire EU without justification

conditions: Probation must be agreed in writing
Maximum 1 month for fixed-term contracts under 2 years
Maximum 2 months for indefinite or fixed-term ≥ 2 years
No probation allowed on fixed-term contracts of 6 months or less
illegalIf: Probation exceeds 1 month on a fixed-term contract under 2 years
Probation exceeds 2 months on any contract
Probation present on fixed-term contract of 6 months or less
exploitativeIf: Probation matches the legal maximum without justification

conditions: Statutory minimum employer notice: 1 month (<5y service), 2m (5–10y), 3m (10–15y), 4m (15y+)
Statutory minimum employee notice: 1 month
Notice must be given before the end of the calendar month
Longer notice for the employee requires equally longer notice for the employer (max 6m)
illegalIf: Employer notice shorter than statutory minimum
Employee required to give longer notice than employer without doubling the employer's notice
exploitativeIf: Employee notice 3+ months while employer notice remains 1 month

conditions: Maximum 12 hours per shift
Maximum 60 hours per week
Average maximum 48 hours per week over 16 weeks
Average maximum 55 hours per week over 4 weeks
exploitativeIf: Open-ended overtime obligation with no compensation or rest guarantees

conditions: Standard full-time hours typically 36–40 per week
Daily rest of at least 11 consecutive hours per 24h
Weekly rest of at least 36 consecutive hours per 7-day period
illegalIf: Standard scheduled hours exceed Arbeidstijdenwet ceilings
exploitativeIf: Standard week scheduled at 45+ hours without overtime pay

conditions: Either party may terminate without notice during a valid probation period
Termination must comply with non-discrimination and good-faith principles
Reason must be communicated in writing on request
illegalIf: Termination during probation occurs after probation period has expired
Termination based on a discriminatory ground
exploitativeIf: Trial-period termination without any communicated reason and a pattern targeting migrant workers
